_comment: Forward decision ledger. /premarket logs EVERY idea (taken or vetoed) at decision time via tools/ledger.py; /postmarket scores open entries against the actual price path. Only SCORED FORWARD calls (logged before the outcome was known) are evidence of edge. Do not backfill historical calls — hindsight taints them.

entries.thesis: SMA200 reclaim on regime-shift day; semis leading on risk-on; mechanical CTA trigger if closes above 200MA
Highest-beta risk-on play; crypto base breakout; gap-and-go if holds past 10:30am with BTC confirmation
Oil supply returning on Iran deal; gap below SMA50; energy rotation out
